title: GPU svd/cholesky/solve/qr drop host bounces
description: Spun out from #604 partial close. The existing gpu_svd_f32/f64, gpu_cholesky_f32/f64, gpu_solve_f32/f64, gpu_qr_f32/f64 in cusolver.rs all do gpu_to_cpu → cuSOLVER → cpu_to_gpu sandwiches. Refactor each to take &CudaBuffer<T> and return CudaBuffer<T> with on-device row↔column transpose, mirroring the gpu_lu_factor pattern landed in #604.
